name: Yuki
intro: Student. Bus pass expired, patience with it.

name: Okada-san
intro: A parent who reads the classifieds twice.

name: Gen
intro: Runs a tuning shop two towns over. Hears things.

name: Kaori
intro: Writes the timed columns in the magazine you read.

name: Numata
intro: Runs thirty taxis. Knows every driver by first name, and pays on the day.

name: Ishida
intro: Thirty years selling cars, and still walks the lot every morning like it's day one.
